description: The open heavens above the world, where the ground is far below and the wind is the only thing holding you up.
biomes: Dense banks of cloud solid enough to stand on, drifting slowly through a blue so deep it hurts to look at.
Narrow currents of compressed air spanning the gaps between floating landmasses. One wrong step and there is nothing below.
A circle of perfect calm surrounded by a wall of screaming wind and black cloud. The sky above is clear and impossibly bright.
Curtains of shimmering light you can walk through. The colors shift and pulse, and the air tingles against your skin.
Flowers and trees growing on platforms of light high above the world. The petals glow softly and the fruit tastes like starlight.
Open darkness scattered with points of brilliant light close enough to touch. The ground is gone and direction has no meaning.
Rivers of fast-moving air that carry anything caught in them across vast distances. Riding them is exhilarating and not entirely safe.
